adoption_success.notes: expected = adoption scan executions started; observed = successful adoption events

progress_events.notes: expected = total gate reconciliation cycles (ideal 1:1 progress signal per cycle); observed = RECONCILIATION_PROGRESS_OBSERVED (non-baseline)

throttle_activation.notes: expected = cycles where no-progress threshold says throttle should activate; observed = gate_reconciliation_throttled true
